# Q-Asker

> AI-powered quiz generator from PDF, PPT, and Word documents.

Q-Asker is a free web service that automatically generates quizzes from uploaded study materials. Users can create fill-in-the-blank, true/false, and multiple-choice questions without signing up.

## Features

- Upload PDF, PPT, or Word files
- AI analyzes documents and generates quizzes automatically
- Three question types: fill-in-the-blank, true/false, multiple-choice
- Detailed explanations with document page references
- Quiz history management
- OCR support for scanned documents
- Multilingual support (Korean, English)

## Links

- Homepage: https://www.q-asker.com
- Korean: https://www.q-asker.com/ko
- English: https://www.q-asker.com/en
- Privacy Policy: https://www.q-asker.com/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://www.q-asker.com/terms-of-service
